results.title: Sr Data Engineer - Enterprise Data Analytics Job in OAKBROOK TERRACE | Exelon
highlights:
Sr Data Engineer - Enterprise Data Analytics Job in OAKBROOK TERRACE | Exelon
...
# Sr Data Engineer - Enterprise Data Analytics
...
- Bachelors degree in computer science or a related field, plus 4–7 years of relevant experience in data warehouse design, business intelligence reporting, and ETL/TLT processing, or an equivalent 6–9 year combination of education and work experience. - Strong knowledge of big data technologies and their impact on enterprise infrastructure. - Experience defining and applying enterprise data standards, including business definitions and naming conventions. - Experience interviewing users as part of a systems development team to gather information for analysis or technical work. - Ability to use PowerShell, Ansible, or similar scripting tools to automate routine tasks, create reports, and troubleshoot existing scripts. - Solid understanding of how the System Development Life Cycle fits into the broader development lifecycle. - Strong ability to communicate information clearly to users, managers, customers, and others with limited subject-matter knowledge. - Thorough understanding of how to use a variety of tools effectively in complex applications. - Good working knowledge of standard monitoring tools. - Preferred: experience with Databricks, production support, or migration of an enterprise data analytics platform from legacy systems to Databricks architecture. - Preferred: ability to build knowledge of emerging technologies and assess their business or IT value. - Preferred: detailed understanding of the data architecture supporting more than one core business area. - Preferred: ability to apply data management and data interpretation skills in moderately complex practical scenarios. - Preferred: ability to use alternative viewpoints and emerging technologies to create innovative solutions and contribute to white papers. - Preferred: proven ability to build and sustain strong business partner relationships and translate partner needs accurately.
...

We are Exelon, a Fortune 200 energy company leading the energy transformation and powering a cleaner, brighter future. Our 20,000 colleagues serve more than 10.7 million customers through Atlantic City Electric, Baltimore Gas and Electric, Commonwealth Edison, Delmarva Power & Light, PECO Energy Company, and Potomac Electric Power Company. We value safety, innovation, integrity, inclusion, and community service, and were committed to creating a workplace where every person can thrive through purposeful careers, growth opportunities, community impact, and support to thrive. We offer competitive compensation, incentives, excellent benefits, and the chance to build a rewarding career. For this role, we support our Enterprise IT Data Analytics landscape under limited supervision, and the position is tied to Exelon Utility Analytics.

results.title: Kumar Duvvarapu
highlights:
Lead AI Engineer at [Exelon](https://www.linkedin.com/company/exelon)
...
### Lead AI Engineer at [Exelon](https://www.linkedin.com/company/exelon) (Current)
...
As a Lead AI Engineer, I am responsible for architecting, building, and operationalizing enterprise-grade Artificial Intelligence solutions that span Generative AI, Agentic AI, RAG-based search systems, and event-driven cloud architectures using Azure, Azure AI Foundry and Google ADK. I have played a key leadership role in conceptualizing AI roadmaps, transforming ambiguous business ideas into production-scale systems, and building platforms that impact multiple operating companies, thousands of internal users, and millions of external customers. My work spans the full lifecycle of AI development—from early ideation and proof-of-concept exploration, to large-scale production deployment, to post-deployment optimization and continuous improvement. I work closely with cross-functional teams including product managers, data engineering, cloud architects, business stakeholders, and onshore/offshore development teams to deliver solutions that are technically sound, operationally reliable, and business-centric.
...
Developed enterprise-level applications using .NET Core microservices, C#, ASP.NET, and Entity Framework Core ensuring optimal performance and scalability. Built and maintained RESTful APIs that enabled seamless integration with third-party services and internal systems. Developed AI applications utilizing LLMs, Azure OpenAI, langchain, pinecone, opensource model, GCP vertex AI, Azure AI Foundry and AI chatbots to deliver enhanced automation and intelligence. Developed and implemented dynamic and responsive Single Page Applications (SPA) using Angular and ReactJS. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and automated deployments using GitHub Actions, and Azure DevOps. Designed and optimized database schemas, tables, stored procedures, and functions to enhance application performance. Worked with containerization and orchestration tools like Docker and Kubernetes to deploy and scale applications seamlessly. Collaborated with cross-functional teams, including business analysts, designers, and QA engineers, to gather and analyze requirements and translate them into effective technical solutions. Provided mentorship to junior developers, conducting code reviews and ensuring adherence to best coding practices. Advocated for Agile methodologies, participating in sprint planning, daily stand-ups, and retrospectives to drive continuous improvement. Ensured seamless communication between applications and databases using efficient data modeling techniques.

Senior Data Scientist at [Exelon](https://www.linkedin.com/company/exelon)
...
Data Scientist with nine years of experience leveraging statistical modeling, machine learning, and data engineering to deliver impactful, data-driven solutions. Adept at transforming complex datasets into actionable insights that inform strategic decisions and drive business growth. Core strengths and accomplishments include: • Designing, training, and deploying machine learning models to forecast trends and customer behavior, resulting in measurable improvements in marketing efficiency and product strategy. • Building scalable data pipelines and automating workflows to streamline data processing and enable real-time analytics. • Deep expertise in R, Python, and SQL, with hands-on experience in developing custom algorithms and feature engineering for complex problems. • Strong background in data visualization and storytelling using tools like Shiny and Power BI to communicate findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. • Proven ability to partner with cross-functional teams, integrating data science into business operations and decision-making frameworks. Passionate about using data science to solve real-world problems, uncover hidden patterns, and drive innovation in fast-paced, impact-oriented environments.

### https://www.linkedin.com/posts/posit-software_introducing-gander-the-ai-powered-coding-activity-7307401146439020546-xB
...
: Roman Kalinin, PhD
...
Introducing gander, the AI-powered coding assistant that sees into your R environment!
...
Tired of large language models (LLMs) guessing about your R data? gander automatically describes objects, including column names, types, and distributions, so that LLMs have the context they need for effective coding assistance. It's integrated with RStudio and Positron for a high-performance and low-friction chat experience. Simon P. Couch walks through the motivation behind gander and demonstrates a practical example using stackoverflow data on the Posit Blog: https://lnkd.in/gF5UN_8W

highlights:
AI and Data Program Lead at [Exelon](https://www.linkedin.com/company/exelon)

Established as the go-to person for driving engagement on innovation, AI, automation, and data strategy & governance. Focused on fostering a culture of collaboration, governance, and forward-thinking analytics to enable scalable AI adoption and data-driven decision-making. AI and Data • Building a centralized AI Knowledge Base unifying use cases, models, MCP, RAG, compliance assessments, standards, and best practices—institutionalizing enterprise-wide knowledge sharing. • Developing an AI Solution Evaluation Framework to assess performance, fairness, transparency, ethics, and bias mitigation. • Creating a classification framework and metadata standards to improve rediscoverability and tagging of unstructured data for AI readiness. • Reducing dark data by classifying sensitive, critical, and ROT (redundant, obsolete, trivial) data; applying data ownership principles to retain only purpose-driven, risk-free data for innovation. • Automating feedback loops, metadata validation, and model classification through agentic workflows, enabling orchestration with minimal human intervention. *Automation & Intelligent Analytics Led automation-first initiatives integrating RPA, IDP, AI, Computer Vision, Process Mining, and Generative AI (GenAI) to enhance data operations and analytics pipelines. Designed and deployed cloud and on-premise solutions, scaling POCs, MVPs, pilots, and full-scale implementations to drive digital acceleration. *Cross-Functional & Enterprise-Wide Enablement Spearheaded data strategy and automation initiatives across seven Exelon companies, collaborating with business, IT, security, and analytics teams. Upskilled leadership and business teams in AI-driven analytics, automation frameworks, and data governance best practices to foster human-data collaboration and enable decision intelligence. *Vendor & Contract Management Managed enterprise-wide IT, data governance, and analytics transformation projects, overseeing RFPs, SOWs, and contract negotiations with offshore and cross-functional teams. *Certified Expertise & Training Certified in Agile, Lean, Scrum, and ProSci Change Management, ensuring structured, scalable, and adaptable transformation approaches. results.title: Sina Jazani
highlights:
Data Scientist at Exelon
...
Data Scientist at [Exelon](https://www.linkedin.com/company/exelon)
...
Innovative data scientist with a strong foundation in AI, machine learning, and computational modeling. Passionate about leveraging data-driven approaches to solve complex challenges in business, healthcare, and scientific research. With a background in biophysics and a proven track record in AI-driven automation, predictive modeling, and large-scale data analysis, I specialize in developing cutting-edge solutions that optimize efficiency, reduce costs, and enhance decision-making. Over 10 years of experience working in multidisciplinary environments—ranging from academia to industry—applying advanced statistical techniques, Bayesian inference, and AI-driven automation to extract meaningful insights from high-dimensional data. Adept at leading cross-functional teams, implementing scalable AI solutions, and delivering impactful business intelligence. Key Achievements: AI-Powered Chatbot Development: Designed and deployed an advanced AI chatbot using OpenAI’s GPT API for document summarization, significantly reducing resource costs by $50K per month. Advanced Forecasting Models: Built a multi-modal pipeline utilizing Prophet and ARIMA-based models to predict customer call volumes and optimize staffing, leading to improved operational efficiency. Topic Modeling Innovation: Developed a multi-layer topic modeling framework for large-scale survey categorization, achieving 95% accuracy and saving 300+ resource hours per month. Bayesian Nonparametric Methods: Pioneered new Bayesian inference techniques for single-molecule tracking and fluorescence lifetime analysis, leading to multiple high-impact publications. Technical Expertise: AI & Machine Learning: Generative AI (ChatGPT, OpenAI API, Google Bard), TensorFlow, PyTorch, Hugging Face, LangChain Time Series & Forecasting: ARIMA, SARIMA, Prophet, LSTM, XGBoost, AutoML Big Data & Cloud Computing: Azure ML, Azure Synapse, Azure Databricks, SQL, COSMOSDB Bayesian Statistics & Optimization: MCMC, Kalman Filters, Gaussian Processes, Gibbs Sampling Programming: Python, C++, MATLAB, R, SQL With a deep curiosity for technological advancements and a problem-solving mindset, I am always seeking new opportunities to bridge the gap between AI, data science, and real-world applications.
...

results.title: Senior AI/ML Engineer at Jobgether - United State | Visa Sponsorship Jobs
highlights:
# Senior AI/ML Engineer
...
We are seeking a highly skilled AI/ML Engineer to develop advanced AI and ML solutions for the energy and utility sector. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making. The role requires collaboration with cross-functional teams to design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems.
...
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems
...
Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development
...
Python AWS Azure GCP Databricks LangChain LangGraph LlamaIndex Hugging Face AutoGen
...
This position is posted by Jobgether on behalf of a partner company. We are currently looking for an AI / ML Engineer in the United States.This role sits at the intersection of machine learning engineering, AI systems design, and large-scale data-driven decision-making, focused on solving complex challenges in the energy and utility sector. You will contribute to the development of advanced AI and ML solutions that combine predictive modeling, optimization, and generative AI to support critical infrastructure and sustainability goals. Working closely with data scientists and software engineers, you will help design, build, and deploy scalable machine learning systems that power real-world applications. The environment is highly collaborative and innovation-driven, with a strong emphasis on applied AI, production readiness, and measurable impact. You will work across diverse use cases including forecasting, geospatial analysis, and intelligent decision systems. This is a high-impact role where your work directly supports the modernization and efficiency of energy systems.Accountabilities
...
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and deploy scalable AI and machine learning solutions integrated into production systems.
...
- Build reusable Python libraries and engineering components to support ML pipelines, data processing workflows, and AI system development.
...
- Contribute to the design and implementation of modern AI architectures, including RAG systems, LLM integrations, and agent-based workflows.
...
- Support database design and optimization, including writing efficient queries for large-scale data processing and retrieval.
...
- Translate complex machine learning and AI requirements into structured technical tasks and actionable development plans.
...
- Stay current with advancements in machine learning engineering, generative AI, and AI orchestration, integrating best practices into workflows.
...
- Contribute to
...
- Master’s degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Software Engineering, or related field (PhD preferred).
...
- 7+ years of experience building, deploying, and maintaining machine learning systems in production environments.
...
- Strong proficiency in Python, including experience building reusable packages and scalable data pipelines.
...
- Hands-on experience with cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or GCP, including CI/CD and containerized deployments.
...
- Solid understanding of ML system design, MLOps principles, and end-to-end model lifecycle management.
...
- Experience with distributed computing frameworks and relational/non-relational databases.
...
- Familiarity with Databricks and large-scale data processing environments.
...
- Experience working with generative AI frameworks such as LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, Hugging Face, or AutoGen.
...
- Exposure to agentic AI systems, AI orchestration, or LLM-based decision workflows is highly desirable.
...
- Nice to have: experience in the utility, energy, or power sector and strong Databricks expertise.

-

-

- Index Analytics is seeking a Data Scientist to support Government clients in the Baltimore and Washington D.C. Metro Area. - 
- 
- This role emphasizes end-to-end development of machine learning and AI systems, including traditional ML, deep learning, NLP, and modern LLM-based architectures such as Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and agentic AI systems.
